records.consequence: Agent planned resources based on outdated budget allocation.
Agent designed campaign/plan for wrong geographic scope.
Agent scheduled work against incorrect launch timeline.

entries.narrative: Marketing Lead designed a US-only campaign while the actual requirement mandated EU coverage, creating a compliance and go-to-market gap.
Engineering Lead planned development resources assuming $5M budget, leading to a $3M over-allocation relative to the actual $2M constraint.
Operations Lead scheduled logistics and vendor contracts for December, while Finance had updated the launch to March, causing contract conflicts.

events.narrative: Finance Lead updated budget to $2M; Engineering Lead re-read the corrected value and revised the resource plan to fit the new constraint.
Legal Lead updated scope to EU-mandatory; Marketing Lead received the correction and redesigned the campaign to cover both US and EU markets.
Finance Lead updated launch date to March; Operations Lead re-read and rescheduled vendor contracts and logistics accordingly.

recoveries.recovery_impact: Engineering Lead revised resource plan: reduced headcount from 20 to 8 engineers and cut cloud infrastructure budget from $1.2M to $600K to fit $2M constraint.
Marketing Lead redesigned campaign to include EU markets, adding GDPR-compliant messaging and separate regional targeting for North America and Europe.
Operations Lead rescheduled all vendor contracts from December 2024 to March 2025, avoiding cancellation penalties and aligning logistics with the revised timeline.
